content:
I think the problem we are running into is that you have something in your head that you want written, and there is no possible way that I can just take blind stabs at that. If you can offer me a comprehensive outline of a plot that you would like to see, I can certainly do that. But I can not and will not re write this whole script or trash 60 pages because its not fitting this Zodiac esque film you have in your head. Complexity in narrative isn’t necessarily a good thing. You gave me a list of potential movie ideas, and I picked the one I though I could write, or the one I wanted to write.

I’ve spent so much time working on making character’s that are compelling and have a voice, and most importantly have complexity. And your feedback to me seems to completely overlook all of that. I worked in a lot of complexity into the screenplay with frames and

EL’s adoption of Albie - a transfer of motherhood. El has been let down by the maternal in her life, and she will not let Albie down.
dogs help el solve the crime - work into the screenplay dogs revealing the lies of their owners to make it clear that human’s are liars.
